action.reasoning: Observation: 60 epochs of SchNet (hidden=128, 6 interactions) gave val MAE 0.0608 eV. ~10s/epoch. Time used: 0.37h, remaining 1.6h. Analysis: Curve still gradually improving but flattening due to cosine schedule. To get better MAE, I should: (1) submit current best as baseline now, (2) train longer with bigger model. Decision: Submit current checkpoint to confirm pipeline works, then continue with a longer/bigger run.
